Finding: Active Directory: Kerberos Pre-Authentication disabled on service accounts (AS-REP Roasting vulnerability)
Active Directory: Domain Controller allows unconstrained delegation
Cisco Discovery Protocol (CDP) enabled on untrusted external interfaces
Unrestricted SMB shares exposing sensitive employee data
Local Administrator password is shared across all workstations (LAPS not implemented)
Web application vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE)
Database listening on public interface without IP filtering
VPN gateway allows connections without Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
Cleartext protocols (Telnet, FTP) in use for remote administration
